message:
test(fcp-host): expand supply_chain and rollout test suites

- supply_chain.rs: +67 tests (45→112) — serde roundtrips for all types,
  cache eviction/invalidation, SLSA level boundaries, builder trust,
  digest matching, dev override edge cases, evidence snapshots
- rollout.rs: +78 tests (48→126) — decision serde/traits, observation
  builders, BPS calculations, health scoring, canary policy, state
  machine transitions, evidence digests, evaluate_decision coverage

fcp-host lib tests: 1089 total, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
